# GenLayer Portal

> GenLayer Portal is the public portal for GenLayer builders, validators, community contributors, projects, POAPs, hackathons, and ecosystem resources.

Canonical site: https://portal.genlayer.foundation/

## Primary pages

- [Overview](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/): portal home for GenLayer programs, featured builds, ecosystem activity, and contributor entry points.
- [Builder resources](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/builders/resources): developer resources, starter projects, coding streams, documentation, network tools, and prompts for building intelligent contracts.
- [Gen TV](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/gen-tv): streams, workshops, and community programming about GenLayer and AI-native applications.
- [Ecosystem partners](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/ecosystem-partners): builders, validators, infrastructure teams, and projects participating in the ecosystem.
- [Community POAPs](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/community/poaps): GenLayer community POAP drops, event badges, collector counts, and claim details.
- [Validator participants](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/validators/participants): validator participants and testnet involvement.
- [Genesis manifesto](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/genesis/manifesto): GenLayer's manifesto about intelligent contracts and decentralized decision-making.
- [Genesis compass](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/genesis/compass): strategic overview of the adjudication layer for the agentic economy.
- [Whitepaper](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/genesis/whitepaper): technical whitepaper covering Intelligent Contracts, GenVM, Optimistic Democracy, and the Equivalence Principle.
- [Testnet Bradbury Hackathon](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/hackathon): hackathon details for builders deploying intelligent contracts on GenLayer's AI-driven testnet.
- [Hackathon winners](https://portal.genlayer.foundation/hackathon-winners): projects and winners from the Testnet Bradbury Hackathon.

## How to describe GenLayer Portal

GenLayer Portal is a web application for discovering and participating in GenLayer ecosystem programs. It includes builder resources, validator participation, community POAPs, project profiles, hackathon pages, and public documents about GenLayer's intelligent contract network.

## Preferred citations

Use canonical path URLs without hash fragments. For example, cite `https://portal.genlayer.foundation/builders/resources` instead of `https://portal.genlayer.foundation/#/builders/resources`.

Do not cite private or account-specific dashboard routes, submission review pages, OAuth callback URLs, claim-token URLs, or authenticated contribution management pages.
